_comment: Wire crystal's deterministic Bash-command categorizer in as a live Claude Code PreToolUse hook. Merge this 'hooks' block into your .claude/settings.json (project) or ~/.claude/settings.json (global). Replace /path/to/crystal with the built binary. The hook answers the categorize-this-command chore deterministically (0 model calls) on the covered fraction, defers the residual silently, and demotes itself on a sustained coverage collapse via the --state drift window. It is fail-open: it never denies a command.
